widgets_values: This model uses a different diffusion model for the first steps (high noise) vs the last steps (low noise).
This model uses the wan 2.1 VAE.

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Negative Prompt)
widgets_values: 色调艳丽，过曝，静态，细节模糊不清，字幕，风格，作品，画作，画面，静止，整体发灰，最差质量，低质量，JPEG压缩残留，丑陋的，残缺的，多余的手指，画得不好的手部，画得不好的脸部，畸形的，毁容的，形态畸形的肢体，手指融合，静止不动的画面，杂乱的背景，三条腿，背景人很多，倒着走

name,prompt
wanvideo,The putter hits the golf ball and it heads towards the sand castle
fill_right,to the right of the sand castle is a small wooden toy bridge going across a small canal of water,512
wanvideo,The golf ball goes through the sand castle and down the toy bridge.
fill_right,to the right of the wooden toy bridge is the head of a clown with it's mouth open on the grass,512
wanvideo,The golf ball goes into the mouth of the clown.
fill_right,to the right of the head of the clown is a stone water fountain with a white golf ball on top,512
wanvideo,The stone water fountain spurts water up and the ball drops onto the grass.
fill_right,to the right of the stone water fountain is a golf flagstick with a flag and hole,512
wanvideo,The golf ball rolls inside the hole under the flagstick, scoring

Tips

* Use a spreadsheet with the "fill_right" rows only to get the image correct.
* The images are stored in ComfyUI's temp folder.  If the first part of the video is ok, but you want to fix the later parts.  You can take an image from there and start mid video.
